mapper.select:
SELECT M.MTRL_CD AS MTRL_CD, M.MTRL_NM AS MTRL_NM, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(S.STOCK_QTY AS BIGINT)), 0) AS QTY, M.BARCODE, /* [추가] 화주사명 가져오기 */ A.AGNT_NM AS AGNT_NM, M.AGNT_CD AS AGNT_CD FROM TBL_STOCK S INNER JOIN TBL_MTRL_M M ON S.CMPY_CD = M.CMPY_CD AND S.AGNT_CD = M.AGNT_CD AND S.MTRL_CD = M.MTRL_CD /* [추가] 화주사 정보 조인 */ LEFT JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M A ON M.AGNT_CD = A.AGNT_CD LEFT JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L ON S.LOC_ID = L.LOC_ID
AND L.LOC_CD = #{locCd}
AND S.STOCK_QTY > 0
GROUP BY M.MTRL_CD, M.MTRL_NM, M.BARCODE, A.AGNT_NM, M.AGNT_CD ORDER BY M.MTRL_NM
SELECT TAKE_DATE, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TBL_STOCK_TAKE WHERE TAKE_DATE >= CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(MONTH, -3, GETDATE()), 112) GROUP BY TAKE_DATE ORDER BY TAKE_DATE DESC

SELECT A.MTRL_CD, B.MTRL_NM, A.PLT_SIZE, A.QTY, B.BARCODE FROM TBL_STOCK_TAKE A LEFT JOIN TBL_MTRL_M B ON A.MTRL_CD = B.MTRL_CD WHERE A.TAKE_DATE = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) AND A.LOC_CD = #{locCd} ORDER BY A.REG_TIME DESC

SELECT A.LOC_CD, A.MTRL_CD, B.MTRL_NM, A.PLT_SIZE, A.QTY, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), A.REG_TIME, 120) AS REG_TIME FROM TBL_STOCK_TAKE A LEFT JOIN TBL_MTRL_M B ON A.MTRL_CD = B.MTRL_CD WHERE A.TAKE_DATE = #{date} ORDER BY A.REG_TIME DESC
